deployable.notes: CLI distribution via Cloudflare Worker proveo-cli (apps/cli). Install: curl -fsSL https://proveo.ca/cli/install.sh | bash. Harness Docker images are buildable locally, not a single public URL.

e2e.runner: go test (+ agent-e2e layer documented in _spec)
e2e.notes: Go e2e_test.go for tmux; Layer-4 agent-E2E documented in _spec/tests/40-agent-e2e-*.puml and TODO.md (PROVEO_LLM_TEST=1). Also apps/cli/public/cli/tests/run_tests.sh smoke suite.
